E3 - Pascale Roy Lafontaine, Surf Guide In Hawaii
programme.desc: The guide Pascale Roy Lafontaine welcomes a group who have come to join his surf camp in Haleiwa, in the Hawaiian archipelago. The perfect opportunity for a hike along the Kuli'ou'ou ridge and admire its spectacular panorama, all amidst the lush vegetation of a unique ecosystem.

programme.title: E15 - From The Riviera To Snowy Peaks!
programme.desc: Heading to the Swiss Valais where the Vingt-Deux, a tiny restaurant, is enjoying huge success. The incredible adventure of the animated film ''Flow,'' largely created in Belgium. The Buissonniere store celebrates its 40th anniversary! And the Gilles of La Louviere at the prestigious Nice carnival.

programme.title: E86
programme.desc: An interactive programme that's as fun as it is informative and reactive to the meteorological events of the moment. Reports from the regions and special subjects in the studio offer an easy way to better understand the impact weather has on health, nature, history and everyday life.

programme.title: E3 - Vegetables

programme.desc: Tim, Tommy, Tia and Dad get stuck on a remote asteroid. // Tim, Kai and Tommy try to get their ball back from Mum's bedroom. // Tia's new balloon gets stuck in a tree, so Tim tries to get it down.

programme.desc: After the Pokey Pigeons eat all of Abuela's elotes, Dora and Boots set out to find more ingredients for the Great Abuela Cook-off. / Dora, Boots and Backpack play an adventurous game of Hide-and-Seek to find Map.

programme.desc: Miss Rabbit persuades Mummy Pig to come along to her relaxation class to help her unwind.

programme.desc: Mr. Crocodile wants to be a good guest at Daisy's birthday party since he's never been to one before. // Rushing to get to a concert on time, Mr. Crocodile and Daisy misplace their tickets at Mom's Box and Ship Shop.

programme.desc: Buddy, the playful dragon from one of Alex's books, gets out and the pups need to get him back. // Francois's trailer unhooked, and all of his critters have gotten loose!

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: The 114th drama serial follows two women, Rin (Mikami Ai) and Naomi (Kosaka Juri), who paved the way for nursing in the Meiji era. Each carries her own struggles, yet together they support one another as they race to protect the wounded and vulnerable, often standing up against powerful forces. Through conflicts and hardships, the two gradually grow. No matter which way the wind blows, this unconventional duo continues their journey in search of happiness.

programme.title: What The Villains Have To Say
programme.desc: Cockroaches, Carbon dioxide, Unwanted hair... Villains are anathema to the public as being 'dirty, noxious, and ugly.' But even villains have a point they want you to hear! programme.title: What The Villains Have To Say
programme.desc: Cockroaches, Carbon dioxide, Unwanted hair... Villains are anathema to the public as being 'dirty, noxious, and ugly.' But even villains have a point they want you to hear! In this program, we look at their amazing abilities revealed by the latest research, as well as the real villains, who are actually a little bit fascinating!

programme.title: E9
programme.desc: 劇情講述一個少女的失蹤交織著無數的謊言和慾望，牽涉其中的七個人遭遇重大事件後發生的故事。這七個人都會為了個人私慾背叛，出賣他人，過著充滿謊言的生活。​

programme.title: E18
programme.desc: 多海是魔論製菓公司疲憊不堪的營銷團隊經理，她不知道自己還能忍受這種看似毫無希望的生活多久。就在這時，一心追求經濟利益的銷售部恩尚向她提出了投資加密貨幣的大膽建議。在經歷了無數次失敗後，加密貨幣成了恩尚最後的救命稻草，也是她扭轉人生的一線希望。會計部智松把花錢等同於幸福，出於害怕被拋在後面，她衝動地加入了他們。這場賭博很快變成了加密貨幣市場跌宕起伏的過山車之旅。當放棄歌唱事業、冉冉升起的公司董事咸志宇加入他們時，不可預測的混亂局面只會加深。這三個普通工人能否中大獎，一路飛向月球？

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: 講述兩名截然不同的人 ─ 缺乏同情心的騙子與同情心氾濫的律師因與邪惡抗爭，組成了一支看起來不太可能實現的聯盟後所發生的故事。

programme.title: E23
programme.desc: 在華麗成功的三位朋友面前，出現一位 10 年前因她們的謊言而成為殺人犯的老朋友，她為揭開三人隱藏在假面之下的真面目而決定背水一戰。而四位老朋友也因一位男人面臨人生漩渦，彼此展開關乎嫉妒和慾望戰爭的故事。

programme.title: E9
programme.desc: 劇情講述一個少女的失蹤交織著無數的謊言和慾望，牽涉其中的七個人遭遇重大事件後發生的故事。這七個人都會為了個人私慾背叛，出賣他人，過著充滿謊言的生活。​

programme.desc: 多海是魔論製菓公司疲憊不堪的營銷團隊經理，她不知道自己還能忍受這種看似毫無希望的生活多久。就在這時，一心追求經濟利益的銷售部恩尚向她提出了投資加密貨幣的大膽建議。在經歷了無數次失敗後，加密貨幣成了恩尚最後的救命稻草，也是她扭轉人生的一線希望。會計部智松把花錢等同於幸福，出於害怕被拋在後面，她衝動地加入了他們。這場賭博很快變成了加密貨幣市場跌宕起伏的過山車之旅。當放棄歌唱事業、冉冉升起的公司董事咸志宇加入他們時，不可預測的混亂局面只會加深。這三個普通工人能否中大獎，一路飛向月球？

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: 故事背景設定在不久的將來，在這個世界中，人們過去的性關係通過一條發光的紅色「S線」在他們頭頂上方以視覺方式連接。一位刑警、一位神秘的老師，以及一個天生能看到這些線的少女，共同應對由這一現象引發的系列令人不安的事件。

programme.title: E13
programme.desc: 講述在司法不公不義的社會中，地下秘密的士公司「彩虹運輸」存在著一位特殊部隊出身的代表的士司機替一群無法受到法律保護的被害者們找回公理。

programme.title: Squawk On The Street
programme.desc: Headquartered live on the floor of the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) where the biggest companies in the world trade, “Squawk On The Street” tracks the action of every stock and gives you access to the treasury, currency and commodity action in real time.

programme.title: E5 - Second Chances
programme.desc: Ice Pilots NWTNewly minted copilot Jeff Tapper is excited for his first revenue DC-3, but his inexperience shows when he botches the approach and bounces the landing three times, nearly running off the runway. Meanwhile, for new rampie Prefkar Mony to realize his dream of becoming a DC-3 pilot, he needs to first pass the written IATRA test. He’s been studying for months, but on his first attempt, he fails. With the help of pilot/mechanic Chris Staples, Prefkar retakes the test and passes, but his victory celebration is short-lived when he’s blamed for leaving an expensive shipment of medicine marked “Do Not Freeze” in a courier van during a minus 30 weekend. Later, Mikey and Katie decide to find Joe a new dog and choose Muffy, a three-year-old dog from the SPCA who is ready to leave her pups. They bring her back to the hangar for a test drive. Joe brings DC-3 CUE out of retirement to test fly the plane for Buffalo’s summer sked duty and he brings along Jeff—and Muffy—to see if they’re

programme.title: E6 - Big Plans, Bad Luck
programme.desc: Mikey talks to a 15-year-old aviation buff in England via Skype, who has discovered that Buffalo’s DC3–WZS–flew on D-Day. This inspires Mikey to do something special for the 70th anniversary. He invites Cory to do a tandem parachute jump and finds out that Cory’s grandfather was a paratrooper at the invasion of Normandy. Meanwhile, Mikey takes mercy on Prefkar, working the ramp in Hay River, and offers him a chance for some pilot training on the morning DC-3 freighter. But when the time comes, Prefkar learns that he’s been bumped for pilot David Alexandre. It gets worse for Prefkar when he’s given another chance and this time the fog rolls in. Prefkar might not stick it out at Buffalo. Mikey’s D-Day plans get even bigger when he contacts the Princess Patricia Canadian Light Infantry, who were part of the Allied airborne forces that dropped behind German lines in 1944. He pitches his plan—a reenactment jump from WZS, an actual D-Day plane. But there’s a hitch: the plane needs to pass in

programme.title: E4 - Schooled by a Girl Scout
programme.desc: When a 13-year-old girl scout needs help earning a primitive camping skills badge, Bear Grylls flies to the rescue… literally. Beth’s wisdom for life and the outdoors is beyond her years, but nothing can prepare her for what challenges bear has in store for this adventure.

programme.title: E2 - Torch vs. Chainsaw
programme.desc: This episode of Showdown of the Unbeatables features Acoustiblok noise reduction material versus The Nathan Air Chime; PVAC personal vacuum assisted climber versus world champion rock climber Tori Allen, and the Broco Torch versus ICS Hydraulic Chainsaw.

programme.title: E10
programme.desc: Ben Milbourne finishes his exploration of Tasmania heading out to the rocky waters between Hobart and Bruny Island. Guided by Rob from the Seafood Seduction Tour, Ben experiences the freshest seafood imaginable. Ben concludes his journey overlooking the beautiful South Coast.

programme.title: History Repeating
programme.desc: After an epic prank, Raign, Brett, Joy, and Hulk end up in detention. Only this time, it wasn't them! The true prankster reveals themselves and shares a clue that can lead to finding the lost fortune.

programme.title: Birthday Cake
programme.desc: It's Adult's birthday. The little cooks want to make him a surprise birthday cake.

programme.title: Poconos
programme.desc: Pocono Mountains adventure: Zipped through Camelback Mountain, segway hike, tested wilderness survival skills, and tried wakeboarding at Lake Harmony. Packed week in the scenic outdoors!

programme.title: Mapping and Levels
programme.desc: How come we see the Earth as flat when we know it's round? A puzzling question lands you in the wondrous world of geography. Have hands-on fun by making a carpenter's level, and get to know Kim Jeong-ho, a cartographer who created the first detailed map of Korea.

programme.title: Time to Be Amazing
programme.desc: It's the first time Harry and George will be competing since George broke his arm and was told he would never be able to do gym again. And Dove and Nyree are determined to prove they are ready to take on the world!

programme.title: No Fear
programme.desc: Competition season is in full swing, and Josh and Kloe are preparing for the biggest competition on the British calendar. While Josh does all he can to calm his nerves, Kloe suffers an injury during practice, and things are not looking good.

programme.title: Pick Me
programme.desc: Pick Me, the Labrador, has a yucky wart removed from his eye, and Jimmy, the horse, has his giant gnashers cleaned. And a one-eyed owl and a cute orphaned fox cub get the Junior Vet treatment.

programme.title: What a Pong!
programme.desc: There is a pong or two in the lab as the doctors discover how your sense of smell can bring back memories. And Dr. Xand is flung back 246 years by the time machine to search for Mr. Grumbles' missing inhaler.

programme.title: The Last Dance
programme.desc: Finn and Kirsten need a medal-winning routine to pursue their goal of the Acro World Championship. So coach Nikki has brought in a top choreographer who hopefully holds the key to success. Meanwhile, things aren't going so well for Dove and Izzy.

programme.title: Darwin's Big Air!
programme.desc: Darwin wants to get big air on his BMX bike, so Heni and Newts help him practice!

programme.title: Trip to Myanmar
programme.desc: During a football game, Milo rips his pants. Alim suggests a skirt, but Milo, backed by Zoe, refuses-skirts are for girls! To change their minds, Alim takes them to Myanmar, where they meet Seng, who introduces them to the 'longyi,' a traditional garment worn by all.

programme.title: Trip to Bulgaria
programme.desc: Zoe and Milo are crafting when Alim arrives with a cold, unable to speak. Zoe suggests using head nods, but Alim's nods confuse them. To explain, he takes them to Bulgaria, where Iliana shows them how Bulgarian nods differ, leading Zoe and Milo into an adventure.

programme.title: Prove It!
programme.desc: Eric juggles three different kinds of balls: a baseball, a tennis ball, and a bouncy rubber ball. Then he does a scientific experiment to see which one can bounce the highest.

programme.title: The Mystery of the Maleficent Mosquitoes
programme.desc: When swarms of mosquitoes mysteriously descend on the park, the kids' summer movie night is in danger of being cancelled unless Addison and her friends can figure out a way to stop them.

programme.title: Dried Leaves
programme.desc: Autumn is here and it's cold, but do not worry! Hepi and Briko have just the activity for us to enjoy at home.

programme.title: Cardboard Box
programme.desc: Hmm all these boxes? What can we do? let's just say we have some 'speedy'' ideas .

programme.title: Little Boom
programme.desc: The smallest of the villains, Boom, has built a weather machine that can send devastating storms down over Bhilka. Sprinter and Leo enlist the help over the sweet Sky Whale to stop Boom.

programme.title: Darwin and Newts Go Flat Out
programme.desc: Darwin and Newts have a fun but fair football game after discovering that their football pitch is tilted and figuring out how to fix it.

programme.title: Only One Can Go
programme.desc: It's the Youth Olympic Games in Argentina, and Amelie has been selected as the only female artistic gymnast to represent Great Britain. Great news for Amelie, but this means she'll be leaving her best friend and training partner - Phoebe - behind.

programme.title: The Inventor (Robert Langer) and The Rebel (Frances Arnold)
programme.desc: In this episode of Becoming Xtraordinary presented by Bear Grylls, inventor and most cited engineer in history Robert Langer and recipient of the Nobel Prize for chemistry, Frances Arnold, reflect on their award-winning careers in science.

programme.title: The Need for Speed
programme.desc: All eyes are on speed skater Izzy who has one last chance to prove she has got what it takes to represent Team Great Britain at the Olympics. And ice dancer Ella swaps her ice skates for pedals at the velodrome.

programme.title: Eric Makes Wind
programme.desc: Eric learns that an anemometer – an instrument to measure wind speed – is important for sailors and for pilots. Then he learns how to make one himself.

programme.title: Darwin and Newts Go Flat Out
programme.desc: Darwin and Newts have a fun but fair football game after discovering that their football pitch is tilted and figuring out how to fix it.

programme.desc: Hmm all these boxes? What can we do? let's just say we have some 'speedy'' ideas .

programme.desc: Eric juggles three different kinds of balls: a baseball, a tennis ball, and a bouncy rubber ball. Then he does a scientific experiment to see which one can bounce the highest.

programme.title: Tumm Se Tumm Tak E263
programme.desc: Anu and Aryavardhan fall in love despite a big age gap. Facing family disapproval and challenges, they fight to show that real love knows no limits or rules.

programme.title: Vasudha E489
programme.desc: Vasudha, a cheerful maid, joins business leader Chandrika's home. Despite differing beliefs, she seeks Chandrika's approval and struggles to fit into her elite world.

programme.title: Jagadhatri E139
programme.desc: Jagaddhatri, a secret crime officer, and orphan Swayambhu partner to fight crime. Only a few friends know her real identity; later, they marry happily.

programme.title: Lakshmi Nivas E76
programme.desc: Lakshmi, a strong-willed woman, bravely faces pressures in a traditional joint family and stays by her husband Shriniwas, who works hard to build his dream house.

programme.title: Saru E320
programme.desc: A kabaddi champion from Rajasthan moves to Mumbai to chase her dreams. Along the way, she reunites with her family and fights hard to earn her mother the respect she truly deserves.

programme.title: Ganga Mai Ki Betiyan E194
programme.desc: Ganga Mai, abandoned for bearing daughters, defies norms with fierce love and dignity, raising three girls who each forge bold, individual paths shaped by their dreams and inner fire.

programme.title: E27 - Musical Statues
programme.desc: At the end of a long day, Bluey and her family are out of sync and out of sorts, so Mum gets everyone to play musical statues.

programme.title: E9 - Ladybird's Gameshow
programme.desc: Spot the odd one out or guess who lives here. A great memory tip from Duggee, an edition of The Agony and Eggstacy, and how to draw Enid - down to her last whisker.

programme.title: E44 - Whistler Mountain, Canada
programme.desc: The Go Jetters are on Whistler Mountain in Canada doing some skiing and checking out the amazing cable car which runs high up between the mountains.

programme.title: E29 - Operation Kiwi
programme.desc: Supertato, Carrot and Tomato are exploring in the plant aisle when they hear a strange noise. They follow the noise and meet the famous Kiwi the Explorer, who needs their help.

programme.title: E30 - Museum Mischief
programme.desc: Evil Pea pretends to help Supertato and Carrot train for crime prevention, but she tricks them and steals a mobile phone. Supertato and Carrot have a clever plan to get it back.

programme.title: E17 - The World Record
programme.desc: The Squirrels want to get a World Record, but in what? And Duggee is too busy to help. 'If only we had more Duggee's' muses Tag. Which gives Norrie a record-breaking idea...

programme.title: E3 - Frog Song
programme.desc: It's fun on the counting train until Naughty Monkey starts to drive! Ethel makes a shape, Frog drops beats with a ribbit song, and Enid turns into anime to chase after a mouse.

programme.title: E8 - Solar Race: Australia
programme.desc: Glitch hopes to win a solar-powered race across the Australian outback.

programme.title: E16 - Andy And The Green Sea Turtles
programme.desc: Andy blasts off in his safari sub, heading to the coast of Borneo in search of green sea turtles.

programme.title: E12 - Sticks
programme.desc: Bella and Lift play with a stick that makes the perfect magic wand. They visit Patch, who has a tasty recipe - sticky stick critters!

programme.title: E4 - The Juice Badge
programme.desc: Duggee is going to make the squirrels juice from the garden. Whilst picking the fruit, the squirrels meet a little bug, full of woes about being too small.

programme.title: E3 - The Shape Badge
programme.desc: It is a lovely day and the squirrels are playing outside. They are playing the shape game. Working out which shape goes where is quite tricky.

programme.title: E14 - Bullet Train, Japan
programme.desc: All aboard for a high-speed adventure, as the Go Jetters visit Japan's Bullet Train.

programme.title: E15 - Star Jumps
programme.desc: Libby and Mum are in the kitchen baking a cake. Libby suggests they have a star-jumping competition to decide who should decorate it.

programme.title: E26 - Fairy Tale
programme.desc: Dad tells Bluey and Bingo a real-life fairy tale about growing up in a wild place called the '80s, about a boy who was cursed when he was mean to his little brother.

WTA 26 Credit One Charleston Open E2[Live]
WTA 26 Credit One Charleston Open E2
E2 - Seasonal
programme.desc: Watch the seasons wax and wane and learn how trees and animals help one another survive. Witness spring fireflies dancing after dark, discover summer fungi that cool off overheated trees, and prep for autumn migrations as the leaves begin to fall.

programme.title: E5 - The Valley of the Birds
programme.desc: Zambia’s Luangwa Valley is home to Africa’s biggest and most fearsome giants, but what really makes it special are its birds. There are over 400 different species here; each perfectly adapted to exploit every opportunity on offer.

programme.title: Woodpeckers: The Hole Story
programme.desc: March to the steady drumbeat of a unique avian family. Learn why the world’s 239 woodpecker species, from massive to minute, are nature’s best lumberjacks; explore their flying, climbing, and calling skills; and get a look inside their secret nests.

programme.title: Weird, Wild & Wonderful
programme.desc: Trek across Africa for a peek at the colorful, quirky survival strategies of its animals. See these furry, feathered, and scaled magicians, from flamboyant flamingos to vanishing lizards, find food, elude predators, and find mates against all odds.

programme.title: E1 - Tropical
programme.desc: Circle the equator for a look at the diverse species that dwell in tropical forests. Meet a lone sloth growing a mini-forest, lemurs that share and share alike, and elephants that tend to their woodland gardens. Then explore the region’s dark side.

programme.desc: March to the steady drumbeat of a unique avian family. Learn why the world’s 239 woodpecker species, from massive to minute, are nature’s best lumberjacks; explore their flying, climbing, and calling skills; and get a look inside their secret nests.

programme.title: E1 - Tropical
programme.desc: Circle the equator for a look at the diverse species that dwell in tropical forests. Meet a lone sloth growing a mini-forest, lemurs that share and share alike, and elephants that tend to their woodland gardens. Then explore the region’s dark side.

programme.title: E2 - Seasonal
programme.desc: Watch the seasons wax and wane and learn how trees and animals help one another survive. Witness spring fireflies dancing after dark, discover summer fungi that cool off overheated trees, and prep for autumn migrations as the leaves begin to fall.

programme.title: E5 - The Valley of the Birds
programme.desc: Zambia’s Luangwa Valley is home to Africa’s biggest and most fearsome giants, but what really makes it special are its birds. There are over 400 different species here; each perfectly adapted to exploit every opportunity on offer.

programme.title: Woodpeckers: The Hole Story
programme.desc: March to the steady drumbeat of a unique avian family. Learn why the world’s 239 woodpecker species, from massive to minute, are nature’s best lumberjacks; explore their flying, climbing, and calling skills; and get a look inside their secret nests.

programme.title: Weird, Wild & Wonderful
programme.desc: Trek across Africa for a peek at the colorful, quirky survival strategies of its animals. See these furry, feathered, and scaled magicians, from flamboyant flamingos to vanishing lizards, find food, elude predators, and find mates against all odds.

programme.title: E1 - Tropical
programme.desc: Circle the equator for a look at the diverse species that dwell in tropical forests. Meet a lone sloth growing a mini-forest, lemurs that share and share alike, and elephants that tend to their woodland gardens. Then explore the region’s dark side.

programme.title: E2 - Seasonal

programme.title: E1 - Tropical

programme.title: E2 - Seasonal
programme.desc: Watch the seasons wax and wane and learn how trees and animals help one another survive. Witness spring fireflies dancing after dark, discover summer fungi that cool off overheated trees, and prep for autumn migrations as the leaves begin to fall.

programme.title: E3 - Villains
programme.desc: Meet nature’s most wanted and see why the baddest of the bad don’t get the respect they deserve. Admire the great white shark’s electrical sensors, the razor-sharp limbs of the dead leaf mantis, and the zombie-creating powers of cordyceps fungi.

programme.title: E4 - Sidekicks
programme.desc: Unravel strange alliances that ensure mutual success in the wild. Explore the partnership between clownfish and anemones, watch oxpeckers keep savannah residents healthy, and review the quid-pro-poo agreements of dung beetles and pitcher plants.

programme.title: E2 - A Friend in Need
programme.desc: Meet more Amazing Animal Friends including Charlotte, a schnauzer who enjoys bath time with her guinea pig pal Wallace, and a randy ram called Hamish who likes to sneak off to live with a herd of dairy cows instead of his own kind.

programme.title: E6 - African Myths
programme.desc: Africa is a continent filled with unique and extraordinary creatures whose lives are shaped by millions of years of evolution. Africa is also the birthplace of humankind. We traveled alongside the continent's animals on our own journey of evolution, yet intelligence took us on a very different path. Our curiosity led to questions about the world around us which were answered through stories, myths and legends.

programme.title: E4 - Let's Play & Learn Outside with JJ!
programme.desc: It's time to play & learn outside with JJ! First, JJ & Cody spend the day taking care of their pets Bingo, Pickles & Jellybean. Then, it's time for a trip to Grandpa's farm to learn about all the animals & the sounds they make! The outdoor fun continues at the park, where JJ discovers tadpoles & learns he'll grow big one day too. The day ends with an exciting soccer match where the kids challenge their parents to a game!

programme.title: E10 - Siblings Month: Family Fun & Learning!
programme.desc: Celebrate Siblings Month with family fun & learning! First, JJ finds his family members all around the house, discovering what each of them does, from playing guitar to painting. Then, join the siblings as they bake a tasty cake together for a special treat! The learning continues as YoYo teaches JJ to love vegetables, the kids race balloon cars & they learn the days of the week through playful activities. It's a month full of family, fun & learning!

programme.title: E1 - Game Day Goofs & Grandma's Fixes!
programme.desc: Get ready for game day goofs & Grandma's amazing fixes! The fun starts with a basketball game, but when Max the Monster Truck tries a slam dunk, he breaks his suspension & gets a teddy bear stuck in the hoop! Then, when Gecko gets a boo boo while trying to fix Bobby the Bus's mixed-up controls, Grandma Gecko arrives just in time to help with the repair. The day ends with Grandma's own goof, as she starts sleepwalking during a sleepover!

programme.title: E1 - Baby John's Big Book of Safety!
programme.desc: Open up Baby John's Big Book of Safety & learn along with him! First, the family learns they must remember their helmets to stay safe on a fun family bike ride. Then, it's time for a trip to the beach, where Mom & Dad teach the kids how to have fun & stay safe as they enjoy the sun & sand. The safety lessons continue at the pool, where Baby John learns the importance of following the rules when swimming.

programme.title: E8 - Party Time, Win, Wait & Eat Greens!
programme.desc: It's a day of learning lessons at parties & games! Pogo is invited to Jeff's party, but Pogo wants it to be energetic while Jeff wants it to be calm, so they must learn to compromise. Then, Newt is desperate to win a gold star at Fuse's gym challenges, but she keeps losing! She has to learn to persevere & not give up. The lessons continue as Lulu learns to wait her turn at a funfair & Fuse finds the courage to eat his healthy greens.

programme.title: E11 - Siblings Month: Playing & Learning!
programme.desc: Join JJ as he plays & learns with his siblings! First, YoYo teaches him the importance of wearing safety gear at the park so everyone can have fun without getting hurt. Then, when Jellybean the class pet goes missing, JJ, TomTom & YoYo team up to find her! The sibling fun continues as they play games on a rainy day, make hot cross buns for their parents' anniversary & learn how much fun it is to clean up together after a day of play!

programme.title: E1 - Creative Farm Adventures!
programme.desc: Get ready for some creative farm adventures with Ella! First, Ella brings school to Lellobee City Farm by creating a classroom in the Boogie Barn & teaching all her animal friends. Then, she helps Mei make some delicious jam using fresh strawberries, grapes & blueberries from the farm! The creative day ends with a magical night of stargazing, where Mei points out constellations that look just like the animals on the farm.

programme.title: E3 - Races, Games & Helping Friends!
programme.desc: Join the crew for some fun competitions & a day of helping friends! First, the friends compete in a fun obstacle course to see who can finish the race the fastest & lift the special trophy! Then, just as the crew is ready to demolish an old building, a cute cat hops inside, & the team must rescue the kitten before finishing the job. The helping continues as they save another kitten from a dangerous situation & Dazey must think fast to save Mrs. Skip from a runaway river barge!

programme.title: E2 - When Everything Goes Hilariously Wrong!
programme.desc: Get ready to laugh as everything goes hilariously wrong for Kii & Yii & their friends! The chaos starts when Robot creates a jelly-making machine, but it goes haywire & he ends up stuck inside a giant wobbly jelly! Then, Princess Cat puts way too much soap in her washing machine, causing it to overflow & fill her entire castle with bubbles! From a wobbly tooth to a picky eater, it's one funny problem after another!

programme.title: E1 - Game Day Goofs & Grandma's Fixes!
programme.desc: Get ready for game day goofs & Grandma's amazing fixes! The fun starts with a basketball game, but when Max the Monster Truck tries a slam dunk, he breaks his suspension & gets a teddy bear stuck in the hoop! Then, when Gecko gets a boo boo while trying to fix Bobby the Bus's mixed-up controls, Grandma Gecko arrives just in time to help with the repair. The day ends with Grandma's own goof, as she starts sleepwalking during a sleepover!

programme.title: E4 - Let's Play & Learn Outside with JJ!
programme.desc: It's time to play & learn outside with JJ! First, JJ & Cody spend the day taking care of their pets Bingo, Pickles & Jellybean. Then, it's time for a trip to Grandpa's farm to learn about all the animals & the sounds they make! The outdoor fun continues at the park, where JJ discovers tadpoles & learns he'll grow big one day too. The day ends with an exciting soccer match where the kids challenge their parents to a game!

programme.title: E8 - Party Time, Win, Wait & Eat Greens!
programme.desc: It's a day of learning lessons at parties & games! Pogo is invited to Jeff's party, but Pogo wants it to be energetic while Jeff wants it to be calm, so they must learn to compromise. Then, Newt is desperate to win a gold star at Fuse's gym challenges, but she keeps losing! She has to learn to persevere & not give up. The lessons continue as Lulu learns to wait her turn at a funfair & Fuse finds the courage to eat his healthy greens.

programme.title: E1 - Creative Farm Adventures!
programme.desc: Get ready for some creative farm adventures with Ella! First, Ella brings school to Lellobee City Farm by creating a classroom in the Boogie Barn & teaching all her animal friends. Then, she helps Mei make some delicious jam using fresh strawberries, grapes & blueberries from the farm! The creative day ends with a magical night of stargazing, where Mei points out constellations that look just like the animals on the farm.

programme.title: E4 - Let's Play & Learn Outside with JJ!
programme.desc: It's time to play & learn outside with JJ! First, JJ & Cody spend the day taking care of their pets Bingo, Pickles & Jellybean. Then, it's time for a trip to Grandpa's farm to learn about all the animals & the sounds they make! The outdoor fun continues at the park, where JJ discovers tadpoles & learns he'll grow big one day too. The day ends with an exciting soccer match where the kids challenge their parents to a game!

programme.title: E2 - When Everything Goes Hilariously Wrong!
programme.desc: Get ready to laugh as everything goes hilariously wrong for Kii & Yii & their friends! The chaos starts when Robot creates a jelly-making machine, but it goes haywire & he ends up stuck inside a giant wobbly jelly! Then, Princess Cat puts way too much soap in her washing machine, causing it to overflow & fill her entire castle with bubbles! From a wobbly tooth to a picky eater, it's one funny problem after another!

programme.title: E1 - Creative Farm Adventures!
programme.desc: Get ready for some creative farm adventures with Ella! First, Ella brings school to Lellobee City Farm by creating a classroom in the Boogie Barn & teaching all her animal friends. Then, she helps Mei make some delicious jam using fresh strawberries, grapes & blueberries from the farm! The creative day ends with a magical night of stargazing, where Mei points out constellations that look just like the animals on the farm.

programme.title: E3 - Races, Games & Helping Friends!
programme.desc: Join the crew for some fun competitions & a day of helping friends! First, the friends compete in a fun obstacle course to see who can finish the race the fastest & lift the special trophy! Then, just as the crew is ready to demolish an old building, a cute cat hops inside, & the team must rescue the kitten before finishing the job. The helping continues as they save another kitten from a dangerous situation & Dazey must think fast to save Mrs. Skip from a runaway river barge!

programme.desc: Gina Chick walks barefoot to the top of Mt Kosciuszko, the rooftop of Australia, and discovers the story of a Polish freedom fighter that the mountain was named after.

programme.title: E6
programme.desc: A tasty sampler of stories from the land - covering food, agriculture, crops, climate, business and innovation - as we meet the fascinating people who make our rural and regional communities unique. Presented by Pip Courtney.

programme.title: E7 - What Doesn't Kill You - Ghanim Al Shnen
programme.desc: Many would have despaired after losing both their arms but Ghanim Al Shnen embraced the possibilities of bionic medicine and focused on a dream - to be reunited with his family after 12 years apart.

programme.title: The Plot
programme.desc: Young-il is a plotter who manipulates murder-for-hire cases to look like accidents. Nobody knows those accidents are in fact perfectly plotted, planned murders. After finishing a flawlessly plotted case with no trace of evidence left behind, Young-il receives a new request. His new target is a prominent political figure who is always under the spotlight. Even with the higher risk of getting exposed, Young-il decides to take the case with his team members, Jackie, Wol-cheon, and Jeom-man. When the plot is ready after immaculate preparation and numerous rehearsals, the team finally makes its move, but some unexpected trouble threatens Young-il's perfect plan.

programme.title: Baogu Produces -Escape from the Windy Town
programme.desc: In the film “Trapped”, border town Mangya was taken over by a group of bandits where only three police officers with one pistol stationed. How could they bring all 44 bandits to justice? First-time director Zhang Qi reveals the inspirations and ideas behind in particular the story of notorious four criminals from the Mainland and Hong Kong's “King of Robbery” Yip Kai Foon while also tells more about his creative motive for several scenes of violence on screen.

programme.title: Plain Jane To The Rescue
programme.desc: Jenny, with the plain looks but a heart of gold, she is always in between jobs. Once she gets a job, her knack of creating awkward situations immediately loses it for her. Fang is her suitor, but he gets nowhere as the girl has no time for love, so Fang goes along with her in job hunting. A big group called Sanda wants to take over the whole city through take-over deals. They are ruthless and have thrown thousands into the streets. Jenny and Fang, bungling as they are, become the vanguard of a movement against the great conglomerate. They were even being hunted by the group and their life was threatened...

programme.title: Plain Jane To The Rescue
programme.desc: Jenny, with the plain looks but a heart of gold, she is always in between jobs. Once she gets a job, her knack of creating awkward situations immediately loses it for her. Fang is her suitor, but he gets nowhere as the girl has no time for love, so Fang goes along with her in job hunting. A big group called Sanda wants to take over the whole city through take-over deals. They are ruthless and have thrown thousands into the streets. Jenny and Fang, bungling as they are, become the vanguard of a movement against the great conglomerate. They were even being hunted by the group and their life was threatened...

programme.title: The Movie Star Says -Chan Hing Kai
programme.desc: Since the 1980's, Chan Hing Kai has created numerous love comedies, yet he opened up that he was “forced” to write them at that time. Later on, he wrote and co-directed “La Brassiere”, a film which entertains without being obscene. He reveals that one of the leading actor, Lau Ching Wan, complained to him afterwards... In this episode, Hing Kai is invited to share the untold stories from his writing career and talk about the changing ecology of screenwriting in the film industry.

programme.title: Back To The Future III
programme.desc: In Back to the Future Part III, Marty travels to 1885 to save Doc from an outlaw. Packed with laughs, action, and heart, it's the epic Wild West finale to the beloved trilogy.

programme.title: House Of Lies
programme.desc: House of Lies is an intense, family-centered drama about two mothers who face off against each other. Shaped by painful pasts, they clash in a fierce battle marked by betrayal, hidden family secrets, and a fight for survival.

programme.title: House Of Lies
programme.desc: House of Lies is an intense, family-centered drama about two mothers who face off against each other. Shaped by painful pasts, they clash in a fierce battle marked by betrayal, hidden family secrets, and a fight for survival.

programme.title: Never Say Die
programme.desc: Never Say Die follows Joey Delgado (Jillian Ward), a principled IT student who runs a vlog spotlighting the quiet heroism of honest police officers-inspired by her father, Major Julio Delgado (Raymart Santiago). Her views are challenged when a viral expose by Andrew Dizon (David Licauco), a sharp and cynical investigative vlogger, paints her father as corrupt and gets him suspended. The expose shatters the home she so carefully nurtured and blames Andrew.

programme.title: Family Feud
programme.desc: It features two families who compete to name the most popular answers to survey questions in order to win cash and prizes

Shaurya Aur Anokhi Ki Kahani
programme.desc: Shaurya, a male chauvinist who believes that every girl's future belongs in the kitchen, is in for a surprise when he crosses paths with Anokhi, a hardworking girl.

programme.title: Saraswati Chandra
programme.desc: Saraswati Chandra calls off his marriage with Kumud, eventually leading to her being married off to a drunkard. Years later, Kumud, now a widow, comes face-to-face with Saraswati.

programme.title: Saraswati Chandra
programme.desc: Saraswati Chandra calls off his marriage with Kumud, eventually leading to her being married off to a drunkard. Years later, Kumud, now a widow, comes face-to-face with Saraswati.

programme.title: Savdhaan India -Naya Adhyay

programme.title: E34
programme.desc: 消防局長宋焰（楊洋飾）和急診科醫生許沁（王楚然飾）分別十年之後重逢，青春時代的兩人因家庭反對被迫分開，再相見時，兩人都有了許多成長和改變。由於工作性質的原因，宋焰和許沁漸漸有了交集。宋焰帶領十里台的消防員們為維護人民生命財產安全而英勇奮鬥，經歷了無數次血與火的生死考驗後仍不改初心。他的堅持感染著許沁，困擾他們多年的心結也漸漸被解開。兩人克服家庭阻力，最後重新走到一起，互相鼓勵，共同進步，用各自的專長守護著這座美麗的城市。

programme.title: E22
programme.desc: 《變成你的那一天》講述了頂流大明星江熠和女娛記者餘聲聲因為一次意外，身體和身份互換。兩人面對現狀只能相互指導，幫對方遮掩，因此發生了一系列逗趣搞笑的故事。

programme.title: E45
programme.desc: 浩瀚的九州大地上，大徵朝珠賦沉重，逼得漁民絞殺親子，以謀鮫女落淚而得鮫珠，沿海漁村的少女海市（楊冪飾）因此遭遇，父母亡故，全村被屠戮。生死關頭，她求助於途經此地的大徵第一權臣方諸（陳偉霆飾演），歷經考驗，最終被方諸帶回天啟。海市從此女扮男裝，成為方諸的徒弟。此時，大徵內憂外患不斷，喜怒不定的年輕皇帝褚仲旭（徐開騁飾），因為經受皇朝內亂，而對生失去了一切興趣，表面上以昏君自居，卻在方諸苦苦支撐國家和平時，暗中默默觀望這一切。

programme.desc: Buddy heads to Chicago to one of the oldest buildings, the Berghoff, famous for their beer and schnitzel. Then he's off to Husk in Nashville, where this spot is putting a unique spin on Southern Classics.

programme.desc: Chef Deborah prepares two dishes inspired by Chinese wontons: an all-American dish made with apple wontons and milk jam; and a collard green dumpling influenced by Southern cuisine.

programme.title: E3 - Machu Picchu - The Salkantay Trek
programme.desc: Ryan journeys deep into Peru along an ancient and remote footpath, where massive snow-capped mountains collide with lush tropical rain forests. programme.desc: Michael finishes his Andalucian odyssey in the capital Sevilla and Carmona.

programme.title: E3 - Machu Picchu - The Salkantay Trek
programme.desc: Ryan journeys deep into Peru along an ancient and remote footpath, where massive snow-capped mountains collide with lush tropical rain forests. The famous Salkantay Trek connects the city of Mollepata with Machu Picchu and passes Mount Salkantay, an outstanding glacier-capped summit.

programme.title: E12 - 走進烏江寨的衣食住行
programme.desc: 以「山河即課堂，行走即成長」為主題，由何廣智、劉奕君、李雅娟、孫藝洲、楊超越組成的「非來游學團」踏入內蒙古的草原、沙漠、礦洞與峽谷，完成了一場真實、鮮活、不設腳本的人文探索，開啟一場兼具治愈感與知識性的旅程。

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: 延續上一季，現代人王衡與西漢海昏侯劉賀再度聯手，他們的足跡從長安延伸至豫章，並深入民間；探討他們如何運用現代思維應對宮廷權謀與民間疾苦，在面對地方積弊和幕後黑手的過程中相互砥礪，並努力改寫歷史。

programme.title: E11
programme.desc: In Onjeong Market, located in Onjeong, a town some distance away from Seoul, the area is buzzing with change as apartment complexes are built and plans for subway extensions and new town developments are announced. Across a single street stand a principled general hospital, Gongmyeongjeongdae Clinic, and traditional Korean clinic, Yangji Barun Clinic. The two families who run these places have been bitter enemies for years, bound by a long standing grudge from an incident in the past. Even the smallest matters turn into big fights, making them the most famous rival families in Onjeong. This is a family growth drama about these two families as they unravel their long held misunderstandings, heal their wounds, learn to love one another, and are reborn as one family.
